projects.title: Discover your projects
projects.description: Orca found these Claude Code workspaces. You can open any of them after setup.
projects.empty: No existing projects found yet. Create one from the sidebar after setup.

mcp.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
mcp.description: MCP servers extend Claude with tools — databases, APIs, browsers, and more.
mcp.hint: Add MCP servers anytime in Settings → Agents → MCP.
mcp.skipHint: You can skip this and configure MCP later.

features.title: Power features
features.description: Orca includes tools beyond chat. Here is a quick overview.

commandPalette.title: Command palette
commandPalette.description: Press ⌘K (Ctrl+K) to jump to sessions, files, git actions, and settings.

gitPanel.title: Git panel
gitPanel.description: Review diffs, commit with AI-generated messages, and manage branches.

taskMaster.title: Task board
taskMaster.description: Enable TaskMaster in Settings → Tasks for kanban-style project planning.

browser.title: Browser automation
browser.description: Enable Browser in Settings → Browser so agents can inspect web pages.

claudeConfig.title: Claude Config
claudeConfig.description: Edit CLAUDE.md, hooks, memory, skills, and agents in Settings → Claude Config.

health.title: System health
health.description: Quick check that Orca is ready to use.
health.legacyPaths: Legacy data paths detected — Orca migrates these automatically on first boot.
